details.description:
Awesome, renovated big 2-bedroom in Williamsburg right off the Subway!
Oak hardwood floors, high ceilings, and large windows letting in tons of natural light!
- Big bedrooms with closets - Renovated kitchen with stainless steel appliances - Elevator, On-Site Super - Only first; security.
Contact ASAP for more info and to schedule a showing! This apartment will not last!
July1 move Small pets welcome

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances

details.description:
Myspace Exclusive! Beautiful apartment in Williamsburg, prime location!
This 2 bedroom apartment features a spacious living room, queen-sized bedrooms, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout.
You?ll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Westlight, Brooklyn Bowl, Extra Fancy, Lucky Dog, Baby?s All Right, Patrizia?s, Battery Harris, Post Office, and Freehold.
Short commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods. Only # blocks from the L train, and a # minute walk to the JMZ trains
July 1 move in Small pets welcome No broker fee

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description:
Myspace Exclusive!
Fabulous 2 bedroom in a classic prewar Williamsburg building. Fully renovated with gorgeous hardwood floors and tons of natural light streaming in. Big living room! Recently renovated. On-site super.
You?ll love living in this vibrant, lively neighborhood with all the necessities right outside your door and steps away from hotspots like Baby?s All Right, Bembe and Rabbit Hole, Williamsburg Bridge, Domino Park, Seawolf, etc. Commuting is quick and easy with a short distance to the Marcy JMZ.
Available June 1 Small pets OK!

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description:
Nice 1 bedroom 1 bath pre-war unit available in south Williamsburg, great quiet location.
- 1 bedroom (could also work as a very small 2 bedroom) - Hardwood floors - Stainless steel appliances
This is the ideal opportunity to live in one of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods. Walk in to a spacious living area with an open kitchen and plenty of dining space. Large bedroom closet. Heat and hot water is included so no need to mind the thermostat. Enjoy a multitude of cafes in your community. Located just a few blocks to Williamsburg Smorgasburg/Flea Market. Cut your commute time to the city with the J, M, Z trains minutes from your door. Bring your small furry friends ? the building allows pets!
Easy commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods. Domino Park, Williamsburg Bridge, etc nearby.
June 1 move in Small pets welcome Heat and hot water included

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances

details.description:
Studio in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

details.description:
Spacious 2BR in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

details.description:
Flexible Layout ? 2 Bed / 2 Bath in the Heart of Downtown Brooklyn
Spacious and versatile, this unique apartment offers two large bedrooms and two full bathrooms with a central hallway kitchen?ideal for roommates, a couple, or anyone needing extra space. Use it as a massive 1-bedroom with home office, two separate studios with private entrances, or a true 2-bedroom (note: no shared living room).
Enjoy north and south exposures, two entrances, and unbeatable convenience?just minutes from Trader Joe?s, Macy?s, and major subway lines.
Flexible layout. Prime location. Endless possibilities.

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description:
The Baltic Canal ? Modern Living in Boerum Hill
Studios, 1-; 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio; panoramic roof deck.
Unbeatable location at the crossroads of Boerum Hill, Gowanus; Park Slope, near Whole Foods, top restaurants, boutique shops; F/G/R trains.
📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

details.description:
2 Bed / 2 Bath at 169 Johnson Ave, Williamsburg ? Pet Friendly
Modern 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment in the heart of Williamsburg, just steps from the Broadway G, Montrose L, and Lorimer J/M trains.
This spacious layout offers a sleek kitchen with stainless steel appliances, a bright living room, and two well-sized bedrooms. Some units feature private balconies or kitchen islands for extra space and style.
The building includes top-tier amenities: ? Fully equipped fitness center ? WiFi-ready business lounge ? Rooftop deck with sweeping Manhattan views
Available now?message to set up a showing.

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description:
Modern living at the Clinton Hill/Bed-Stuy border!
Spacious 2-bed with open layout, private balcony, hardwood floors, high ceilings, and great light. Central A/C, dishwasher, and stainless steel appliances.
Enjoy building perks: gym, lounge, game room, furnished roof with skyline views, laundry, bike storage, and shared workspaces.
Close to Franklin Ave C/S trains (1 block), local spots like Outpost, Doris, Sisters; more.
📍 1st month + security to move in 📍 No broker fee

amenities.other: A/C, Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Intercom system, Central A/C, Roof Access

details.description:
June 1 ? Spacious 2.5 Bed near the Knickerbocker M! Pets Welcome (with approval)
Bright and roomy apartment featuring:
Two queen-sized bedrooms plus a bonus room (no window)
Exposed brick and modern finishes
Dishwasher
Great natural light
Spacious living area
Sleek bathroom
4th floor walk-up
Amazing Bushwick location?just a short walk to local favorites like Boobie Trap, Rico Chimi, Talon Bar, and Old Stanley?s. Close to the Knickerbocker M and Myrtle M/L trains!

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description:
Prime Crown Heights Living at 1499 Bedford Ave!
Discover the epitome of modern living at 1499 Bedford Ave, a new building in the heart of Crown Heights. Located steps from Eastern Parkway and multiple subway lines, and within walking distance of Grand Army Plaza, Brooklyn Botanical Gardens, and Prospect Park, this residence offers unparalleled convenience and vibrant city life.
Building Amenities:
State-of-the-art fitness room Pet wash station Laundry facilities (in-unit laundry in some units) Social lounge with game room Furnished rooftop with panoramic city views Second-floor public terrace Open workstations Dedicated mail room
Unit Features: Private terraces and balconies in select units Kitchen islands in select units Large windows with abundant natural light Stunning views of NYC skyline, Prospect Park, and neighborhood streets
Welcome to 1499 Bedford Ave?where luxury, community, and convenience meet. Experience the best of Crown Heights living.

amenities.other: Balcony/Terrace

details.description: Discover your new home at 31-19 37th St, where comfort and style meet in perfect harmony. This stunning industrial-chic apartment offers two sunlit bedrooms and a large private patio in a building filled with modern amenities. Experience the charm of historic Astoria while enjoying conveniences such as an elevator, a laundry room, a residents' lounge, and a fully furnished rooftop with breathtaking views of the Manhattan skyline. With easy access to the N/Q lines at Broadway and the R/M lines at Steinway, you'll be just 20 minutes away from Midtown.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Private Outdoor Space

details.description:
This building is arguably THE MOST desirable neighborhood in Brooklyn. Right on the Williamsburg Waterfront with gorgeous river and city views, all the restaurants, coffee shops, bars, art and music venues, plant shops, parks, farmers markets, grocers, and absolutely anything and everything else you could desire right outside your door. Be warned: the luxury experience you are offered inside the building may leave you feeling torn about whether to go out and enjoy the bustle of the neighborhood or stay in and enjoy your own amenities right here at home!Conveniently located off the J. M, and L trains, as well as the B32, B62, and Q59 bus routes.
UNIT FEATURES: Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Dishwasher Central A/C and Heat Private Balcony Excellent light from extra large windows
BUILDING FEATURES: Bike Room Courtyard Elevator Fitness Center Laundry Room Tenant Lounge Package Room Finished Roof Deck First; Security NO FEE

amenities.other: Balcony/Terrace, Central A/C, Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Private Outdoor Space, Roof Access, Shared Outdoor Space, Washer/Dryer In Unit

details.description:
? One Fifty Lawrence ? Elevated Living in the Heart of Downtown Brooklyn
Welcome to One Fifty Lawrence, a modern 25-story tower redefining Brooklyn living. Nestled between Fulton and Willoughby Streets, this striking new residence blends refined design, thoughtful amenities, and unbeatable convenience ? just steps from the Jay St?MetroTech subway hub.
Inside, discover bright studio, one-, and two-bedroom apartments with expansive windows, high ceilings, and sleek finishes. Each home is crafted for comfort and style, featuring top-of-the-line appliances, in-unit laundry, and energy-efficient systems.
Residents enjoy access to an impressive amenity collection: a state-of-the-art fitness center, rooftop terrace with sweeping skyline views, resident lounge, and co-working spaces ? all within a pet-friendly community.
At One Fifty Lawrence, you?re surrounded by everything Downtown Brooklyn offers ? premier shopping, dining, and cultural destinations ? while being minutes from Manhattan and the rest of the borough.
Modern design. Urban energy. Unmatched convenience. This is One Fifty Lawrence.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

details.description:
The Westmark is a new three-tower development that brings something genuinely different to Brooklyn: signature arched architecture, a landscaped connecting courtyard shared by all residents, and a location that puts Carroll Gardens dining, Whole Foods, and Prospect Park within easy reach. Studios, one-bedrooms, and two-bedrooms are available now ? many with private balconies, terraces, or wraparound terraces with open city views.
Inside your home Floor-to-ceiling windows flood every residence with natural light. Finishes are high-end throughout: custom Italian cabinetry, stone countertops, premium stainless appliances, wide-plank oak flooring, integrated Bluetooth speakers with per-room volume control, and in-unit washer/dryer. Bathrooms are spa-finished with custom vanities and designer tile.
Amenities - 24/7 concierge lobby ? Grand entrance, package handling, secure bike storage - Rooftop + sky lounge ? Sweeping skyline views, cabana seating, outdoor lounge - Fitness + yoga studio ? Full fitness center with dedicated yoga space - Work + social spaces ? Co-working lounge, library, game lounge, movie room - Resident lounge ? Expansive lounge + kids playroom
*Apartment images shown may not represent the actual unit and or view of the apartment listed. Please inquire for more information.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Central A/C

details.description:
Modern 2-Bedroom in the Heart of Flatbush!
Welcome to 1457 Flatbush Ave, a newly built residence offering style and convenience. This 2-bed, 1-bath unit features a washer/dryer in-unit, balcony, and abundant natural light.
🏢 Building Amenities: ? Fully equipped fitness center ? Rooftop terrace with city views ? Stylish residents? lounge ? Bike storage; on-site laundry
? Apartment Features: ? Modern kitchen with stainless steel appliances ? Spacious living areas with contemporary finishes ? Large windows for great natural light
📍 Prime Flatbush location ? steps from shops, dining; easy transit access.
🐾 Pet-friendly | Guarantors welcome. 📅 Schedule a viewing today!

amenities.other: Balcony/Terrace, Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C
